scripts.codegen: ruby -ryaml -rjson -e 'puts JSON.pretty_generate(YAML.load_file("./openapi.yaml"))' > ./.openapi.codegen.json && orval --config ./orval.config.ts && ruby -e 'path = File.expand_path("../api-zod/src/index.ts", __dir__); lines = File.readlines(path).reject { |line| line.include?("./generated/types") }; File.write(path, lines.join)' && rm -f ./.openapi.codegen.json
